diagrams.title: Subset Sum DP Table Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how dp[i][j] table is filled for set {3, 4, 5} with target W=9
elements: Arrows showing recurrence from previous rows
diagrams.purpose: Understand how DP builds solution incrementally by considering each element

diagrams.title: Backtracking Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Binary tree showing all subset possibilities for set {1,2,3}
diagrams.purpose: Visualize exponential search space and how backtracking explores subsets

diagrams.title: Meet-in-the-Middle Approach
diagrams.description: Illustration of splitting set and combining subset sums
elements: Set S divided into S1={a,b,c} and S2={x,y,z}
Left side: all 2^3=8 subset sums from S1
Right side: all 2^3=8 subset sums from S2
Search for pair (s1,s2) such that s1+s2=target
diagrams.purpose: Understand how MITM reduces exponential to 2^(n/2) complexity
